title: A-SUB Sublimation Paper A4, 210x297mm, 100 Sheets, 125gsm, Compatible with EPSON, SAWGRASS, RICOH, Brother Sublimation Printers
features: Versatile Compatibility 🖨️🎨: A-SUB Sublimation Paper is compatible with a range of sublimation printers, including EPSON, SAWGRASS, RICOH, Brother, and more. Perfect for high-quality polyester, materials with up to 30% cotton content, premium ceramic, tiles, phone cases, and metal plates, expanding your creative possibilities.

High Transfer Rate of ≥98% 🌈🔄: Achieve stunning and vibrant prints with a transfer rate of at least 98%. A-SUB Sublimation Paper is engineered to deliver exceptional colour reproduction, ensuring your designs come to life with precision and accuracy.

Rapid Drying Performance ⏩🔥: Boost your efficiency with the fast-drying capabilities of our sublimation paper. Say goodbye to long waiting times, allowing you to move quickly from printing to the exciting process of heat transfer.

A4 Size, 125gsm, 100 Sheets per Pack 📄💯: Designed for convenience and versatility, each pack includes 100 sheets of A4-sized sublimation paper with a weight of 125gsm. This ample supply allows you to embark on numerous creative projects without interruption.

No Fracturing Guarantee 🚫✨: Experience smooth and flawless sublimation prints every time with A-SUB Sublimation Paper. Our advanced technology ensures no fracturing during the transfer process, providing you with professional-quality results.
description: Product Description Sublimation printing is the popular technology of the digital printing area. Mostly have the fast dry & tacky sublimation paper. You can find the different size & weight here. We are a professional manufacturer of sublimation paper for 20 years. A-SUB is designed to work specifically with EPSON, SAWGRASS, RICOH, Brother Sublimation Printer and provides consistent performance from printing to transfer process. What you see is what you get! 125gsm Sublimation Paper 120gsm Sublimation Paper Eco Series Sublimation Paper Mug Size Sublimation Paper Sublimation Ink Refill Sublimation Ink Easy Filling Series Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 57,008 4.6 out of 5 stars 15,681 4.8 out of 5 stars 4,393 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,000 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,713 4.6 out of 5 stars 682 Price £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 — no data £31.39 £ 31 . 39 Versatile compatibility ensures stunning, vibrant prints with a transfer rate of at least 98%. Versatile compatibility and high transfer performance ensure vibrant prints with precision. Engineered for exceptional colour reproduction, it brings designs to life with precision while being budget-friendly. Specifically designed for 11 oz mugs, this 3.5x9-inch sublimation paper fits perfectly, eliminating the need for cutting in your projects. 480ml of Abundant Supply, Vibrant Colours, and Universal Compatibility with Epson Desktop Printers Effortless Filling for Epson Ecotank Printers, with 4x 150ml of Ultra-High Capacity Ink for Long-Lasting, Vibrant Colour Printing.
